name: E-12 per-rule per-file cache: --cache-stats reports hits, misses, and bytes so F-2 can compute the cache hit rate
command: printf 'x\n' > in.txt && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/run-detector.sh" --rule g-ts-001 --in in.txt --cache --cache-location cache.json --cache-stats 2>err.txt; grep -q '"hits":' err.txt && grep -q '"misses":' err.txt && grep -q '"bytes":' err.txt && echo stats_reported 1>&2
